title: Missing round-trip deserialization tests for ChatKind, ChatMemberRole, OwnerPresence Unknown variants
description: ChatKind, ChatMemberRole, and OwnerPresence all have Unknown(String) tuple variants with manual serde. PushUrgency has test_push_urgency_unknown_preserves_original_string that verifies the full round-trip: deserialize unknown wire string -> Unknown(s) -> serialize back to the same wire string. The three new enums lack an equivalent test. A regression in as_str() or the deserializer arm would not be caught. Pattern to follow: test_push_urgency_unknown_preserves_original_string at types.rs:1862.
